resultList.dtldesc: Indulge in the epitome of luxury with this stunning 3 BHK flat for sale in the prestigious Naraina Vihar, New Delhi. Offering a perfect blend of elegance and comfort, this property presents an exceptional opportunity for discerning homeowners.Property specificationsSpanning a super area of 1600 sq ft and a carpet area of 1250 sqft, this flat is located on the 1st floor of a G3 building. It comes semi-furnished with wardrobes in all bedrooms, fans in all rooms, cabinets in the drawing room, lights in all rooms, and chandeliers in the living and dining area, exuding a sophisticated ambiance. The flooring is adorned with exquisite marble, adding a touch of opulence. The flat is vaastu compliant and faces the favorable east direction, ensuring positive energy and harmony.The flat comprises three spacious bedrooms, each accompanied by an attached bathroom. The bathrooms are western-style and come with geysers for hot water. Additionally, two bedrooms have attached balconies overlooking the main road, offering a pleasant view. The living and dining areas are separate, providing ample space for relaxation and entertainment. The modular kitchen is equipped with a chimney, a hob, and an RO water purifier, ensuring a delightful cooking experience. A piped gas connection is also available for added convenience.FacilitiesThe property offers one covered car parking space in the basement and one open parking space, ensuring the safety and security of your vehicles. Enjoy uninterrupted water supply, with both borewell and corporation water sources available. The flat is equipped with an inverter, ensuring 100 power backup. The building is serviced by one lift, providing easy access to all floors.LocalityThe location of this property is truly advantageous, with prominent landmarks such as the Maruti authorized car service center and the adjacent SBI bank. Reputed schools, such as Salwan and Springdill, are within close proximity, ensuring quality education for children. Renowned hospitals, including Apex, Kapoor, Gangaram, and Max Hospital, are within 500 meters to 5 kilometers, providing access to excellent healthcare facilities. Rajouri Mall is just 1 kilometer away, offering a range of shopping and entertainment options. Public transportation options, including buses and autos, are easily available right outside the property, ensuring seamless commuting. SBI bank and ATMs are adjacent, providing financial convenience. Delhi Cantonment railway station is 5 kilometers away, offering excellent connectivity. Additionally, the Narayana Vihar metro station is a mere 200 meters away, further enhancing connectivity. The airport is conveniently located just 10 kilometers away, ensuring easy travel options.
